title.risk: strongest style/name evidence but value differs from accepted visible baseline title
generic name and no serialized 18pt/Bold style

deviations: All four dataset fields and DesignerState columns serialized as String/System.String; Units did not serialize as Int32 and UnitCost did not serialize as Decimal.
The 18pt Bold ReportTitle textbox contains InventoryReportTitle, while the accepted visible title Synthetic Inventory Detail is in unstyled Textbox9.
The intended detail names serialized as DetailUnit and the misspelled DetailUnitCose rather than DetailUnits and DetailUnitCost; DetailUnits names the static Units header.
UnitCost uses Report Builder's explicit currency pattern rather than the literal C2 token.
PageWidth and PageHeight are omitted; independent Report Builder validation confirms effective Letter portrait behavior.
One implicit Details member serialized, but there are zero non-detail grouping expressions.
